visuals.title: File System Concepts - Attributes, Operations, Types, Access Methods & Layers
visuals.description: Animated visual covering file attributes (name, type, size, location, protection, timestamps), file operations (create, open, read, write, seek, close, delete), file types with extensions, three access methods (sequential, direct, indexed), and the layered file system structure.
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="400" data-topic-id="file-system">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bgGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E8EAF6"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#C5CAE9"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowIndigo" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="6" refX="8" refY="3" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L8,3 L0,6 Z" fill="#3949AB"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="arrowTeal" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="6" refX="8" refY="3" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L8,3 L0,6 Z" fill="#00695C"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="arrowOrange" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="6" refX="8" refY="3" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L8,3 L0,6 Z" fill="#E65100"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="arrowRed" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="6" refX="8" refY="3" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L8,3 L0,6 Z" fill="#C62828"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="420" height="400" fill="url(#bgGrad)" rx="12"/>

  <!-- ========== GROUP 1: Title (0.3s) ========== -->
  <g data-narration="A file system organizes and manages data on storage devices. It defines how files are named, stored, accessed, and protected." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="22" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">File System Concepts</text>
    <line x1="110" y1="28" x2="310" y2="28" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>

  <!-- ========== GROUP 2: File Attributes (1.5s) ========== -->
  <g data-narration="Every file has attributes or metadata stored by the OS: Name identifies the file, Type indicates its format, Size shows bytes, Location points to the disk address, Protection controls access rights, and Timestamps record creation and modification times." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>

    <!-- Section label -->
    <text x="15" y="46" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">File Attributes (Metadata)</text>

    <!-- File icon shape -->
    <path d="M15,52 L15,120 L165,120 L165,62 L155,52 Z" fill="white" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <path d="M155,52 L155,62 L165,62" fill="none" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.5"/>

    <!-- Attribute labels inside file icon -->
    <rect x="22" y="57" width="60" height="13" fill="#3949AB" rx="2"/>
    <text x="52" y="67" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Name</text>

    <rect x="88" y="57" width="60" height="13" fill="#3949AB" rx="2"/>
    <text x="118" y="67" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Type</text>

    <rect x="22" y="74" width="60" height="13" fill="#5C6BC0" rx="2"/>
    <text x="52" y="84" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Size</text>

    <rect x="88" y="74" width="60" height="13" fill="#5C6BC0" rx="2"/>
    <text x="118" y="84" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Location</text>

    <rect x="22" y="91" width="60" height="13" fill="#7986CB" rx="2"/>
    <text x="52" y="101" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Protection</text>

    <rect x="88" y="91" width="60" height="13" fill="#7986CB" rx="2"/>
    <text x="118" y="101" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Timestamps</text>

    <!-- Tiny note -->
    <text x="90" y="116" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="6" fill="#3949AB">Stored in directory entry / inode</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ========== GROUP 3: File Operations (3.0s) ========== -->
  <g data-narration="The operating system provides fundamental file operations: Create allocates space, Open loads metadata into memory, Read and Write transfer data, Seek repositions the file pointer, Close releases resources, and Delete frees the file space." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>

    <!-- Section label -->
    <text x="185" y="46" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#00695C">File Operations</text>

    <!-- Operation pills -->
    <rect x="185" y="52" width="52" height="16" fill="#00695C" rx="8"/>
    <text x="211" y="63" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Create</text>

    <rect x="242" y="52" width="52" height="16" fill="#00695C" rx="8"/>
    <text x="268" y="63" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Open</text>

    <rect x="299" y="52" width="52" height="16" fill="#00695C" rx="8"/>
    <text x="325" y="63" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Read</text>

    <rect x="356" y="52" width="52" height="16" fill="#00695C" rx="8"/>
    <text x="382" y="63" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Write</text>

    <rect x="185" y="73" width="52" height="16" fill="#00897B" rx="8"/>
    <text x="211" y="84" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Seek</text>

    <rect x="242" y="73" width="52" height="16" fill="#00897B" rx="8"/>
    <text x="268" y="84" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Close</text>

    <rect x="299" y="73" width="52" height="16" fill="#00897B" rx="8"/>
    <text x="325" y="84" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Delete</text>

    <rect x="356" y="73" width="52" height="16" fill="#00897B" rx="8"/>
    <text x="382" y="84" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Truncate</text>

    <!-- Operation flow arrow -->
    <text x="185" y="103" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#00695C">Typical flow:</text>
    <text x="230" y="103" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#00695C" font-weight="bold">Create</text>
    <text x="262" y="103" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#00695C">-></text>
    <text x="276" y="103" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#00695C" font-weight="bold">Open</text>
    <text x="298" y="103" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#00695C">-></text>
    <text x="312" y="103" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#00695C" font-weight="bold">R/W</text>
    <text x="331" y="103" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#00695C">-></text>
    <text x="345" y="103" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#00695C" font-weight="bold">Close</text>

    <!-- Open-file table note -->
    <rect x="185" y="108" width="223" height="14" fill="#E0F2F1" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="0.5" rx="3"/>
    <text x="296" y="118" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#00695C">Open() adds entry to Open-File Table with file pointer</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ========== GROUP 4: File Types (4.5s) ========== -->
  <g data-narration="Files are classified by type using extensions or magic numbers. Executable files have dot-exe extension, text files use dot-txt, source code uses dot-c, object files use dot-obj, and image files use dot-jpg. The OS may use file type to determine how to process a file." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="4.5s" fill="freeze"/>

    <!-- Section label -->
    <text x="15" y="140" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#E65100">File Types</text>

    <!-- Table header -->
    <rect x="15" y="145" width="90" height="14" fill="#E65100" rx="2"/>
    <text x="60" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Extension</text>
    <rect x="107" y="145" width="70" height="14" fill="#E65100" rx="2"/>
    <text x="142" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Type</text>

    <!-- Row 1: .exe -->
    <rect x="15" y="161" width="90" height="13" fill="#FFF3E0" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="60" y="171" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#E65100" font-weight="bold">.exe .com .bin</text>
    <rect x="107" y="161" width="70" height="13" fill="#FFF3E0" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="142" y="171" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#E65100">Executable</text>

    <!-- Row 2: .txt -->
    <rect x="15" y="175" width="90" height="13" fill="#FBE9E7" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="60" y="185" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#E65100" font-weight="bold">.txt .doc</text>
    <rect x="107" y="175" width="70" height="13" fill="#FBE9E7" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="142" y="185" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#E65100">Text</text>

    <!-- Row 3: .c .java -->
    <rect x="15" y="189" width="90" height="13" fill="#FFF3E0" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="60" y="199" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#E65100" font-weight="bold">.c .java .py</text>
    <rect x="107" y="189" width="70" height="13" fill="#FFF3E0" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="142" y="199" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#E65100">Source Code</text>

    <!-- Row 4: .obj -->
    <rect x="15" y="203" width="90" height="13" fill="#FBE9E7" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="60" y="213" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#E65100" font-weight="bold">.obj .o</text>
    <rect x="107" y="203" width="70" height="13" fill="#FBE9E7" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="142" y="213" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#E65100">Object</text>

    <!-- Row 5: .jpg -->
    <rect x="15" y="217" width="90" height="13" fill="#FFF3E0" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="60" y="227" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#E65100" font-weight="bold">.jpg .png .gif</text>
    <rect x="107" y="217" width="70" height="13" fill="#FFF3E0" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="142" y="227" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#E65100">Image</text>

    <!-- Magic number note -->
    <text x="15" y="242" font-family="Arial" font-size="6" fill="#BF360C">Magic numbers (e.g., 0x7F ELF) identify type internally</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ========== GROUP 5: Access Methods (6.0s) ========== -->
  <g data-narration="There are three main file access methods. Sequential access reads records one after another like a tape. Direct or random access jumps to any block by its number. Indexed access uses an index table that maps keys to block positions for fast lookup." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="6.0s" fill="freeze"/>

    <!-- Section label -->
    <text x="195" y="140" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828">Access Methods</text>

    <!-- === Sequential Access === -->
    <text x="195" y="155" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828">1. Sequential</text>
    <!-- Tape-like blocks -->
    <rect x="195" y="158" width="22" height="14" fill="#FFCDD2" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.8" rx="1"/>
    <text x="206" y="168" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#C62828">R1</text>
    <rect x="219" y="158" width="22" height="14" fill="#FFCDD2" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.8" rx="1"/>
    <text x="230" y="168" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#C62828">R2</text>
    <rect x="243" y="158" width="22" height="14" fill="#EF9A9A" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.8" rx="1"/>
    <text x="254" y="168" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#C62828">R3</text>
    <rect x="267" y="158" width="22" height="14" fill="#FFCDD2" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.8" rx="1"/>
    <text x="278" y="168" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#C62828">R4</text>
    <rect x="291" y="158" width="22" height="14" fill="#FFCDD2" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.8" rx="1"/>
    <text x="302" y="168" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#C62828">R5</text>
    <!-- Arrow showing sequential flow -->
    <line x1="195" y1="176" x2="313" y2="176" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="1.2" marker-end="url(#arrowRed)"/>
    <text x="254" y="184" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="6" fill="#C62828">read next, write next</text>

    <!-- === Direct / Random Access === -->
    <text x="195" y="197" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828">2. Direct (Random)</text>
    <!-- Numbered blocks -->
    <rect x="195" y="200" width="20" height="14" fill="#FFCDD2" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.8" rx="1"/>
    <text x="205" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#C62828">0</text>
    <rect x="217" y="200" width="20" height="14" fill="#FFCDD2" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.8" rx="1"/>
    <text x="227" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#C62828">1</text>
    <rect x="239" y="200" width="20" height="14" fill="#FFCDD2" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.8" rx="1"/>
    <text x="249" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#C62828">2</text>
    <rect x="261" y="200" width="20" height="14" fill="#EF9A9A" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.8" rx="1"/>
    <text x="271" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#C62828">3</text>
    <rect x="283" y="200" width="20" height="14" fill="#FFCDD2" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.8" rx="1"/>
    <text x="293" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#C62828">4</text>
    <!-- Jump arrow to block 3 -->
    <path d="M320,194 C335,194 335,207 283,207" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="1" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowRed)" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>
    <text x="340" y="198" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#C62828">read(3)</text>
    <text x="254" y="224" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="6" fill="#C62828">jump to block n directly</text>

    <!-- === Indexed Access === -->
    <text x="195" y="237" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828">3. Indexed</text>
    <!-- Index table -->
    <rect x="195" y="240" width="50" height="12" fill="#C62828" rx="2"/>
    <text x="220" y="249" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Index</text>
    <rect x="195" y="253" width="50" height="10" fill="#FFCDD2" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="220" y="261" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#C62828">K1->B2</text>
    <rect x="195" y="264" width="50" height="10" fill="#FBE9E7" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="220" y="272" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#C62828">K2->B5</text>
    <rect x="195" y="275" width="50" height="10" fill="#FFCDD2" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="220" y="283" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#C62828">K3->B1</text>

    <!-- Data blocks -->
    <rect x="280" y="253" width="18" height="10" fill="#FFCDD2" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="289" y="261" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="5" fill="#C62828">B1</text>
    <rect x="300" y="253" width="18" height="10" fill="#EF9A9A" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="309" y="261" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="5" fill="#C62828">B2</text>
    <rect x="320" y="253" width="18" height="10" fill="#FFCDD2" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="329" y="261" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="5" fill="#C62828">B3</text>
    <rect x="340" y="253" width="18" height="10" fill="#FFCDD2" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="349" y="261" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="5" fill="#C62828">B4</text>
    <rect x="360" y="253" width="18" height="10" fill="#EF9A9A" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="369" y="261" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="5" fill="#C62828">B5</text>

    <!-- Arrows from index to blocks -->
    <line x1="245" y1="258" x2="278" y2="258" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.8" marker-end="url(#arrowRed)"/>
    <line x1="245" y1="269" x2="270" y2="269" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.8" fill="none"/>
    <path d="M270,269 L270,258 L358,258" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.8" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowRed)"/>

    <text x="330" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="6" fill="#C62828">key-based lookup via index</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ========== GROUP 6: File System Layers (7.5s) ========== -->
  <g data-narration="The file system is structured in layers. Applications call the Logical File System which manages metadata. The File Organization Module translates logical blocks to physical blocks. The Basic File System issues I/O commands. I/O Control contains device drivers. At the bottom are the physical storage Devices." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="7.5s" fill="freeze"/>

    <!-- Section label -->
    <text x="15" y="260" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">File System Layered Structure</text>

    <!-- Layer 1: Application -->
    <rect x="15" y="266" width="165" height="18" fill="#3949AB" rx="3"/>
    <text x="97" y="278" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Application Programs</text>
    <!-- Arrow down -->
    <line x1="97" y1="284" x2="97" y2="289" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.2" marker-end="url(#arrowIndigo)"/>

    <!-- Layer 2: Logical File System -->
    <rect x="15" y="291" width="165" height="18" fill="#5C6BC0" rx="3"/>
    <text x="97" y="303" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Logical File System</text>
    <line x1="97" y1="309" x2="97" y2="314" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.2" marker-end="url(#arrowIndigo)"/>

    <!-- Layer 3: File Organization Module -->
    <rect x="15" y="316" width="165" height="18" fill="#7986CB" rx="3"/>
    <text x="97" y="328" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="white" font-weight="bold">File-Organization Module</text>
    <line x1="97" y1="334" x2="97" y2="339" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.2" marker-end="url(#arrowIndigo)"/>

    <!-- Layer 4: Basic File System -->
    <rect x="15" y="341" width="165" height="18" fill="#9FA8DA" rx="3"/>
    <text x="97" y="353" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="#3949AB" font-weight="bold">Basic File System</text>
    <line x1="97" y1="359" x2="97" y2="364" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.2" marker-end="url(#arrowIndigo)"/>

    <!-- Layer 5: I/O Control -->
    <rect x="15" y="366" width="165" height="18" fill="#C5CAE9" rx="3" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="97" y="378" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="#3949AB" font-weight="bold">I/O Control (Drivers)</text>
    <line x1="97" y1="384" x2="97" y2="389" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.2" marker-end="url(#arrowIndigo)"/>

    <!-- Layer 6: Devices -->
    <rect x="15" y="391" width="165" height="6" fill="#3949AB" rx="2"/>

    <!-- Role annotations on the right -->
    <text x="185" y="278" font-family="Arial" font-size="6" fill="#3949AB">user-level file calls</text>
    <text x="185" y="303" font-family="Arial" font-size="6" fill="#5C6BC0">metadata, protection, dirs</text>
    <text x="185" y="328" font-family="Arial" font-size="6" fill="#7986CB">logical-to-physical block map</text>
    <text x="185" y="353" font-family="Arial" font-size="6" fill="#9FA8DA">generic I/O commands</text>
    <text x="185" y="378" font-family="Arial" font-size="6" fill="#7986CB">device drivers, interrupts</text>
    <text x="185" y="397" font-family="Arial" font-size="6" fill="#3949AB">HDD / SSD / NVMe</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Bottom border accent -->
  <rect x="0" y="394" width="420" height="6" fill="#3949AB" rx="0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="8.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
</svg>

diagrams.title: File System Layered Architecture
diagrams.description: The file system is organized as a series of layers, each using the features of lower layers to create new features for higher layers.

layers.label: Application Programs
layers.role: User-level programs that issue file system calls (open, read, write, close)

layers.label: Logical File System
layers.role: Manages metadata (file control blocks / inodes), directory structure, and protection

layers.label: File-Organization Module
layers.role: Translates logical block addresses to physical block addresses, manages free space

layers.label: Basic File System
layers.role: Issues generic commands to device drivers to read and write physical blocks on disk

layers.label: I/O Control
layers.role: Device drivers and interrupt handlers that translate generic commands into hardware-specific instructions

diagrams.title: File Attributes
diagrams.description: Key metadata stored for every file in the file system

attributes: Type - File type (executable, text, source, etc.)
Size - Current file size in bytes/words/blocks
Location - Pointer to file location on device
Protection - Access control (read, write, execute permissions)
Timestamps - Creation time, last modified, last accessed

diagrams.title: File Access Methods
diagrams.description: Three primary methods for accessing data in a file

sequential.description: Read records one after another in order

direct.description: Jump to any block by block number

indexed.description: Use an index table to map keys to block positions
indexed.use_case: Large databases, file systems with B-tree indexes
